
import { Tabs } from 'nextra/components'

# v1



GreeterService provides greeting functionality.


---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #0070f3', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### SayHello <span style={{backgroundColor: '#0070f3', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginLeft: '0.5rem'}}>UNARY</span>

SayHello sends a greeting to the server.

<div style={{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'2rem',alignItems:'start'}}>
<div style={{flex:'1 1 400px',minWidth:0}}>

#### Request: HelloRequest

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>name</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>name is the name of the person to greet.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>language</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><span style={{fontSize:'0.75rem',background:'#059669',color:'white',padding:'2px 8px',borderRadius:'4px',marginRight:'0.5rem'}}>optional</span> <code>string</code><br/><br/>language optionally selects the greeting language.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Response: HelloReply

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>message</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>message is the greeting message.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Errors

##### `NOT_FOUND`

the requested person was not found.


##### `INVALID_ARGUMENT`

input validation failed.

Detail type: `google.rpc.BadRequest`


```json
{
  "field_violations": [
    {
      "description": "must not be empty.",
      "field": "name"
    },
    {
      "description": "must be a valid BCP-47 language tag.",
      "field": "language"
    }
  ]
}
```




</div>
<div style={{flex:'0 0 380px',minWidth:0,position:'sticky',top:'6rem'}}>

<Tabs items={['grpcurl', 'Go']}>
<Tabs.Tab>
```bash
grpcurl -plaintext \
  -d '{"name": "example", "language": "example"}' \
  localhost:50051 \
  greeter.v1.Greeter/SayHello
```
</Tabs.Tab>
<Tabs.Tab>

```go
import (
	"context"
	"log"

	"google.golang.org/grpc"
	"google.golang.org/grpc/credentials/insecure"
	greeterv1 "<YOUR-GO-MODULE>/rpc/greeter/v1"
)

func main() {
	conn, err := grpc.NewClient("localhost:50051",
		grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()),
	)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer conn.Close()

	client := greeterv1.NewGreeterClient(conn)
	resp, err := client.SayHello(context.Background(), &greeterv1.HelloRequest{
		Name: "example",
		Language: "example",
	})
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	_ = resp
}
```

</Tabs.Tab>
</Tabs>

</div>
</div>

</div>

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #7928ca', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### SayHelloStream <span style={{backgroundColor: '#7928ca', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginLeft: '0.5rem'}}>SERVER STREAM</span>

SayHelloStream streams greetings back to the client.

<div style={{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'2rem',alignItems:'start'}}>
<div style={{flex:'1 1 400px',minWidth:0}}>

#### Request: HelloRequest

<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>name</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>name is the name of the person to greet.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>language</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><span style={{fontSize:'0.75rem',background:'#059669',color:'white',padding:'2px 8px',borderRadius:'4px',marginRight:'0.5rem'}}>optional</span> <code>string</code><br/><br/>language optionally selects the greeting language.</td>
</tr>

#### Response: HelloReply

</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>

<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>message is the greeting message.</td>
